headlines: Geen bloemen. Dit zit altijd goed.

images.description: A close-up photograph of a human wrist wearing three stacked dark beaded bracelets with small square metal charms engraved with the letters "SB," positioned against a light beige fabric background, with a second hand visible touching the wrist from above. The image contains the text "STONEY bracelets" in the upper right, a circular badge in the upper left reading "SPECIAAL VOOR MOEDERDAG" with a heart outline, and the headline "Dit geef je wél" in large white and gold serif font on the left side. Additional Dutch text reads "Geen bloemen. Dit zit altijd goed. Upgrade je Moederdag." along with a tan button labeled "KIES HAAR FAVORIET →" and a delivery note at the bottom stating "VOOR 15:00 UUR BESTELD, MORGEN IN HUIS" accompanied by a small delivery truck icon. The overall color palette is dark and warm, with soft diffused lighting on the right side of the image.

A close-up photograph shows a woman's wrist and lower face, with her mouth slightly visible at the top; she wears a peach/cream ruffled sleeve blouse and has two dark beaded bracelets stacked on her wrist, featuring black and textured dark grey beads with small gold-toned square charm beads engraved with the letters "SB." The image contains Dutch-language text including "SPECIAAL VOOR MOEDERDAG" inside a circular graphic with a heart icon, the headline "Dit geef je wél," body text reading "Geen bloemen. Dit zit altijd goed. Upgrade je Moederdag.," a call-to-action button labeled "KIES HAAR FAVORIET →," a delivery notice "VOOR 15:00 UUR BESTELD, MORGEN IN HUIS" with a delivery truck icon, and the brand name "STONEY bracelets" at the bottom left. The overall color palette is dark and warm-toned with soft, directional lighting highlighting the wrist area.
